title: Learning | NexusNow.ai
content: top of pageSkip to Main ContentAbout UsWhy Choose UsOur ServicesIndustriesBankingInsuranceTelecom and MediaManufacturingRetail and Supply ChainLeadersLearningCareersContact UsENABLING SUCCESS THROUGH KNOWLEDGE AND CERTIFICATIONSEmpowering Organizations with ServiceNow Expertise for Unparalleled Growth.How NexusNow.ai Supports Your ServiceNow Training and Certification JourneyAt NexusNow.ai, we are committed to equipping organizations with the expertise and skills needed to fully leverage the power of ServiceNow. Our comprehensive training and certification programs help businesses optimize their ServiceNow investments, ensuring a seamless transition from advisory and implementation to upskilling and certification.Why ServiceNow Training and Certification with NexusNow.ai?ServiceNow is an industry-leading platform that drives innovation and efficiency across organizations. To harness its full potential, structured training and certifications are essential. At NexusNow.ai, we offer end-to-end guidance tailored to your organization’s goals.​ Comprehensive Training Modules: From beginner-level training to advanced tracks, we cater to every stage of your ServiceNow adoption. Certified Expertise: Delivered by certified professionals with deep domain experience in ServiceNow functionalities. Tailored Learning Paths: Personalized training plans aligned with your business objectives and employee roles. ServiceNow Certification Tracks We OfferWhether you are starting your ServiceNow journey or looking to upskill your team, NexusNow.ai provides expert training for a wide range of certification tracks:​​​ Certified Implementation Specialist (CIS): Build expertise in modules like CSM, ITSM, HRSD, and FSM. Certified System Administrator (CSA): Learn the fundamentals of ServiceNow administration and platform navigation. Certified Technical Architect (CTA): Master advanced architecture and system integration to create scalable solutions. Customer Service Management (CSM): Specialized training for managing customer workflows and enhancing experiences. Application Development and Integration: Hands-on training for app development using ServiceNow Creator Workflows and API integration. AI and Automation Integration: Equip your teams with AI-powered tools and automation strategies embedded in ServiceNow. Training on Generative AI and ServiceNow Integration: Advanced training to merge the capabilities of Generative AI with ServiceNow modules for innovative solutions. Now Assist Module Training: Comprehensive training on ServiceNow’s AI-powered conversational interfaces to enable intelligent virtual assistants, automate customer interactions, and streamline issue resolutions. Our End-to-End Training Journey Advisory and Planning: Assess your organizational training needs. Design a strategic roadmap for certification and upskilling. Custom Curriculum Development: Define role-based training plans to align certifications with business outcomes. Hands-On Labs and Workshops: Real-world scenarios for practical exposure to ServiceNow functionalities and the Now Assist module. Examination Support: Prepare candidates for ServiceNow certification exams with mock tests and review sessions. Continuous Learning and Upskilling: Provide access to advanced certifications as organizational needs evolve. Key Benefits of Our Training Programs Boost Employee Productivity: Certified employees are equipped to solve real-world challenges, driving efficiency across teams. Accelerate ROI: Optimized ServiceNow utilization leads to faster returns on investment. Stay Industry Competitive: Certification ensures your organization remains at the forefront of ServiceNow capabilities. Build Internal Capability: Reduce dependency on external consultants by developing in-house expertise. Ensure Scalability: Certified teams can adapt to evolving business needs and ServiceNow updates seamlessly. In ConclusionAt NexusNow.ai, we recognize that knowledge is the foundation of transformation. Our training and certification programs empower organizations to maximize their ServiceNow investment, enhance operational efficiency, and achieve sustainable growth. From enabling your teams to excel in core ServiceNow functions to integrating Generative AI and the Now Assist module for advanced capabilities, NexusNow.ai ensures your organization is future-ready. ​ By fostering seamless connections between advisory, training, and certification, NexusNow.ai is your trusted partner in building ServiceNow expertise for the future.Registration Form for ServiceNow Training and CertificationFirst NameLast NameEmailPhoneCurrent RoleSelect RolePreferred Certification TrackSelect CertificationYears of Experience with ServiceNowPreferred Training ModeSelect Training ModeLocation PreferenceSelect LocationAdditional NotesSubmitNexusNow.aiQuick LinksAbout UsWhy Choose UsIndustriesTeamCareersContact UsOur ServicesLearningSingapore Office Nexusnow.ai 160 Robinson Road, Suite #10-01 SBF Center Singapore 068914Corporate Headquarters Nexusnow.ai ONE BKC, Plot No. C-66, G Block, Cabin No. 1715, 17th Floor, Bandra Kurla complex, Bandra East, Mumbai, India - 400051 +91 98453 92147 info@nexusnow.aiGlobal Delivery Center Nexusnow.ai Awfis Vajram Esteva, New Survey No. 57/4, Old Survey No. 57/2 1st Floor, Marathahalli-Sarjapur Outer Ring Road, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560103© 2026 - NexusNow.AI Privacy PolicyTerms of Usebottom of page

title: Sanjay Chakrabarty | NexusNow.ai
content:
## Sanjay Chakrabarty


## Chairman & Founder


## Sanjay Chakrabarty is the Chairman & Founder of Nexusnow.ai, bringing decades of experience in the technology sector - from startups to scaling businesses globally. Under his leadership, Nexusnow.ai is committed to delivering next-generation AI-driven solutions that redefine business transformation across industries. Sanjay is the Founder & Managing Partner of Capital Square Partners (“CSP”), a technology and business services focused private equity fund manager based and regulated in Singapore. CSP has done investments of over $3 billion, including debt and equity, over the last decade. He led the buyout of CSS Corp (from Partners Group) in 2021, which has since been rebranded to Movate Inc. (www.movate.com), where he serves as Chairman of the Board. Sanjay is also a Director on the Board of Startek (www.startek.com), Relevance Lab (www.relevancelab.com), and Bits in Glass (www.bitsinglass.com), which are current portfolio companies of CSP. He was also a Board member and led CSP’s investment into Indecomm (exited to Warburg Pincus in 2019), Minacs (exited to Concentrix in 2016), and Aegis Holdings (merged with Startek in 2018), among others. Prior to founding CSP, Sanjay was the President and Venture Partner at Columbia Capital, overseeing investments in India and Southeast Asia. He also previously founded and served as CEO of MobiApps Holdings, a technology company focused on satellite communication products including building a patent protected RF ASIC semiconductor chip. He successfully led MobiApps from inception to a strategic exit, including creating a joint venture with TATA Autocomp Systems. Earlier in his career, Sanjay worked as a management consultant at Arthur D. Little in Washington, DC, and Singapore, specializing in Telecommunications, Technology, and Energy sectors. Sanjay holds an MBA from Carnegie Mellon University, where he received the Danforth fellowship, and dual Bachelor of Science degrees in Computer Engineering and Mathematics from Pennsylvania State University at Slippery Rock. He is also an avid musiciantrained in Indian classical music, and performs regularly on the Sarod.

## Bhaskar Ranjan Das


## Chief Operating Officer

Bhaskar has held leadership positions across multiple domains, including IT, eLearning, and consulting, driving success through strategic business development and operational excellence. He has held key roles at the Association of International Certified Professional Accountants, Realization Technologies, Manipal Universal Learning, and Universitas 21 Global, demonstrating his ability to build and manage both large multifunctional teams and small startup units. His diverse background gives him a unique perspective on transforming traditional businesses with innovative technology solutions and market expansion strategies. In his role at NexusNow.ai, Bhaskar is responsible for overseeing the company's operational strategy, focusing on the development and delivery of AI-powered transformation projects. He is passionate about leveraging his skills in strategic partnerships, business insights, and digital transformation to optimize processes and drive growth. His expertise spans areas like robotic process automation, IT services, corporate relations, and cross-functional team leadership, which are crucial for NexusNow.ai’s mission to deliver cutting-edge AI-driven solutions. Bhaskar's success is also marked by his experience in building strong relationships with CXO-level executives across sectors, from banking to education. As COO, Bhaskar ensures that NexusNow.ai delivers operational excellence while expanding its reach globally, making an impact in the technology landscape through innovative solutions for industries like BFSI, telecom, and healthcare.

title: Jayanta Lahiri | NexusNow.ai
content:
## Jayanta Lahiri


## CEO and Co-Founder


## Jayanta Lahiri brings over 30 years of global experience in technology, outsourcing, and consulting. As the CEO and co-founder of NexusNow.ai, Jayanta drives strategic growth through AI-driven technology solutions and digital transformations. His career has spanned diverse roles, including leading large-scale technology operations, spearheading digital transformation initiatives, and establishing technology strategies across multiple industries. Jayanta has held prominent leadership roles at some of the world’s leading organizations, such as Accenture, Wipro, Infosys, AXA Technologies, Firstsource, and Startek. In these roles, he played a pivotal role in managing digital transformation, multi-cloud infrastructure, application modernization, AI, analytics, and cybersecurity, ensuring that technology investments align with business growth and innovation. His expertise lies in harnessing the power of Generative AI, advanced analytics, customer experience, automation, and cybersecurity to empower enterprises in their digital transformation journey. Jayanta’s experience extends across Banking, Insurance, Manufacturing, Retail, Telecom, Healthcare, Oil & Gas, and E-commerce sectors, among others, focusing on creating innovative solutions that drive business resilience and success. Jayanta is known for his advisory and transformation capabilities, having led multiple consulting engagements for Fortune 500 clients globally. He has successfully transformed enterprise IT landscapes, enabled strategic roadmaps, and guided organizations through AI adoption and cloud migration, emphasizing operational excellence and innovation. Under his leadership, NexusNow.ai aims to be at the forefront of AI-driven transformation, delivering industry-leading ServiceNow solutions, intelligent automation, and scalable AI-driven workflows to clients worldwide.

## Jyotin Gambhir


## US GEO Head


## Jyotin Gambhir is an accomplished cybersecurity leader with over 25 years of experience delivering enterprise-grade security solutions for businesses across multiple industries. As the US GEO Head at NexusNow.ai, he drives AI-powered ServiceNow deployments in ITSM, CRM, Legalflow, and GRC modules, optimizing processes and generating measurable ROI. Previously, Jyotin served as Managing Partner & CISO at Ockham Corp (2021–2023), providing cybersecurity services to enterprise clients, addressing governance, strategy, compliance, and integration of security processes and technologies. He was also Managing Director at SecureFLO, leading penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, IoT and cloud security, and regulatory compliance projects for standards like SOX, HIPAA, FISMA, SSAE18 SOC2, CMMC, and GDPR. His earlier roles include Cybersecurity Lead at CIOAdvisory.ai, Manager – Audit & Enterprise Risk Services at Deloitte, Senior Sales Engineer at IBM, Senior Software Consultant & Sales Engineer at BMC Software, and Sales & Marketing Manager at Infinite Possibilities. He has also served as a Board Member at New England ISC2. Jyotin holds an MBA in International Business from the University of Tampa and a BBA in Business Administration and Computer Science from MIU, and is recognized as an Honored Listed by Marquis Who’s Who. His expertise combines strategic leadership, advanced cybersecurity, and innovative AI adoption to safeguard enterprise operations while enabling scalable digital transformation.
